Abbreviations: ICU = intensive care unit; RSV = respiratory syncytial virus.
* The primary analysis included case-patients and control patients who were admitted to an ICU and assessed the relative odds of previous receipt of nirsevimab in RSV-positive case-patients compared with control patients.
† Respiratory failure was defined as requiring treatment with continuous positive airway pressure, bilevel positive airway pressure, or invasive mechanical ventilation, when level of respiratory support received during hospitalization exceeded respiratory support received at baseline. This analysis included case-patients with respiratory failure and all ICU-admitted control patients to ref
